---
title: "Connor Flynn"
image: "bren_photo.png"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/connor-flynn-0699241bb/"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/ConnorFlynn"
  - label: Email
    url: "connorflynn@ucsb.edu"
output:
  postcards::trestles
site: distill::distill_website  
---
 
Hi, I am currently studying Environmental Data Science at the Bren School of Environmental Science & Management, UCSB.
